title: ArcheAge
notes: Glyph launcher opens but clicking "Play Game" does nothing

cpu: AMD A8-7600 Radeon R7, 10 Compute Cores 4C+6G
notes:
No messing with anything under the hood; just tried through Steam interface and with user_settings.py tweaks as above. 
Glyph launcher starts and sits there. Pressing the play button does nothing. There is a wineserver running and some other wine processes but no game appears and nothing in the process list looks like it might be ArcheAge.
title: ArcheAge

notes:
The Glyph launcher worked just fine using Proton 3.7-8, the game however won't start. I'm not getting any error or pop-up. I tried disabling DX11, installing directx9, vcrun2005, vcrun2008 and corefonts in all kinds of combinations.

I also tried starting the game using Proton 3.16-3 beta but the launcher won't even start using that Proton version.
title: ArcheAge

notes:
The Glyph launcher works fine out of the box, but once I login, I can't start the game, because I only see a big red "UPDATE" button. Clicking it does nothing essentially.

PS. I do not have linked Steam account.
